scripts.build:ios: npm run generate:ios && xcodebuild -project ios/TueAPI.xcodeproj -scheme TueAPI -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build
scripts.release-check:ios: npm run generate:ios && xcodebuild -project ios/TueAPI.xcodeproj -scheme TueAPI -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath ios/build/TueAPI.xcarchive archive CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.archive:ios: npm run generate:ios && xcodebuild -project ios/TueAPI.xcodeproj -scheme TueAPI -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath ios/build/TueAPI.xcarchive archive
